on-accent.$description: Text on the yellow accent card (re-derived near-black; AA verified on #EEAF00).

accent-1.$description: Full secondary-accent text paired with surface.soft-1 (card hover reveal 1). NOTE: does not meet AA on soft-1 tint.

accent-2.$description: Full secondary-accent text paired with surface.soft-2 (card hover reveal 2). NOTE: does not meet AA on soft-2 tint.

accent-3.$description: Full secondary-accent text paired with surface.soft-3 (card hover reveal 3). NOTE: does not meet AA on soft-3 tint.

accent-4.$description: Full secondary-accent text paired with surface.soft-4 (card hover reveal 4). AA passes on soft-4 tint.

muted.$description: Alternating section bands & neutral control fills (base tier).

brand-primary.$description: Primary blue brand surface — alternate hero panel fill.

chat-agent.$description: Agent chat surface (white + border to stay distinct from canvas).

soft-1.$description: Soft decorative surface (secondary-accent tint) — rotating card hover palette 1 of 4.

soft-2.$description: Soft decorative surface (secondary-accent tint) — rotating card hover palette 2 of 4.

soft-3.$description: Soft decorative surface (secondary-accent tint) — rotating card hover palette 3 of 4.

soft-4.$description: Soft decorative surface (secondary-accent tint) — rotating card hover palette 4 of 4.
